name: Anker Innovations Limited
summary: Anker Innovations Limited develops and sells smart charging products worldwide. It offers portable batteries, and wired and wireless charging products for the home, car, and on-the-go, as well as charging products for phones, tablets, and laptops under the Anker brand name; speakers and earphones under the Soundcore brand name; Alexa-powered home speakers, lights, vacuums, and smart plugs under the EUFY brand name; portable projectors under the NEBULA brand name; and dashcam cameras, smart car chargers, and Alexa car kits under the ROAV brand name. The company was founded in 2011 and is based in Changsha, China.
